questions.context_sentence: Yaming saw the Guest-Greeting Pine, the Sea of Clouds, lots of strange rocks, and many ancient buildings.
questions.cn: 亚明看到了迎客松、云海、许多奇形怪状的岩石以及许多古老的建筑。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个古老的 (ancient) 人表现得很耐心 (patient)。
questions.prompt: Yaming saw the Guest-Greeting Pine, the Sea of Clouds, lots of strange rocks, and many ____ buildings. (提示: adj. 古代的；古老的)

questions.meaning: n. 度假营；营地 v. 露营；宿营
questions.context_sentence: went to a summer camp
questions.cn: 去参加了夏令营
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 露营地 (camp) 里有一盏漂亮的台灯 (lamp)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 度假营；营地 v. 露营；宿营

questions.context_sentence: The landscape there was amazing.
questions.cn: 那里的风景太迷人了。
questions.hint: 合成词: land (土地) + scape (景象) -> 土地上的景象就是风景。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：landscape

questions.context_sentence: lots of strange rocks
questions.cn: 许多奇形怪状的岩石
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个陌生 (strange) 的地方发生了一些改变 (change)。
questions.prompt: lots of ____ rocks (提示: adj. 奇怪的；陌生的)

questions.context_sentence: Where did Yaming / Emma go on holiday / vacation?
questions.cn: 亚明/艾玛去哪里度假/过节了？
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 假期 (vacation) 去了一个非常好玩的地方 (location)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 假期；度假

questions.context_sentence: Don't forget that.
questions.cn: 别忘了那个。
questions.hint: 词干法: for (为了) + get (得到) -> 为了得到新的，就要忘记 (forget) 旧的。
questions.prompt: Don't ____ that. (提示: v. 忘记；遗忘)

questions.context_sentence: It was fantastic.
questions.cn: 这太棒了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个极好的 (fantastic) 玩具是塑料 (plastic) 做的。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：fantastic
options: adj. 戏剧性的；引人注目的

questions.context_sentence: Yes, we stayed in the old town for a few days, and we enjoyed it very much.
questions.cn: 是的，我们在古镇住了几天，我们非常喜欢这里。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 顺着这条路往下 (down) 走，就是我们的那个小镇 (town)。
questions.prompt: Yes, we stayed in the old ____ for a few days, and we enjoyed it very much. (提示: n. 镇；商业区)

questions.meaning: n. 呼吸的空气；一口气
questions.context_sentence: It just took my breath away.
questions.cn: 这简直让我惊叹不已。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: breath (呼吸) 和 death (死亡) 只差一个字母，没有呼吸就死亡。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 呼吸的空气；一口气

questions.context_sentence: It just took my breath away.
questions.cn: 这简直让我惊叹不已。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: 拿走某人的呼吸 (breath) -> 让人惊讶得说不出话，令人惊叹。
questions.prompt: It just ____ my breath away. (提示: 令人惊叹；让人叹绝)

questions.context_sentence: Everything tasted good, especially the steamed chicken soup.
questions.cn: 每样东西尝起来都很棒，尤其是汽锅鸡。
questions.hint: 词缀法: especially 是在 specially (特别地) 前加 es 强化语气，意为“尤其”。
questions.prompt: Everything tasted good, ____ the steamed chicken soup. (提示: adv. 尤其；特别)

questions.context_sentence: Everything tasted good, especially the steamed chicken soup.
questions.cn: 每样东西尝起来都很棒，尤其是汽锅鸡。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: steamed (蒸的) + chicken (鸡) + soup (汤) -> 汽锅鸡。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：steamed chicken soup

questions.meaning: adv. & pron. 在任何地方；随便哪个地方
questions.context_sentence: Did you go anywhere interesting?
questions.cn: 你去过什么有趣的地方吗？
questions.hint: 合成词: any (任何) + where (地方) -> 任何地方。
questions.prompt: Did you go ____ interesting? (提示: adv. & pron. 在任何地方；随便哪个地方)

questions.meaning: pron. 没有事；没有任何东西
questions.context_sentence: I did nothing special.
questions.cn: 我没做什么特别的事。
questions.hint: 合成词: no (没有) + thing (东西) -> 没有东西。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：pron. 没有事；没有任何东西

questions.context_sentence: Really? Everyone says the scenery around the West Lake is so beautiful.
questions.cn: 真的吗？大家都说西湖周围的风景太美了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: scen (看，舞台) + ery -> 舞台上的景色就是风景。
questions.prompt: Really? Everyone says the ____ around the West Lake is so beautiful. (提示: n. 风景；景色)

questions.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
questions.cn: 像其他人一样，我准备好去某个地方度假了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: already (已经) 的词根就是 ready (准备好的)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：ready

questions.meaning: 马上要(做某事)；愿意做(某事)
questions.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
questions.cn: 像其他人一样，我准备好去某个地方度假了。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: ready (准备好的) + to do (去干某事)。
questions.prompt: Like everyone else, I was ____ to go on a holiday somewhere. (提示: 马上要(做某事)；愿意做(某事))

questions.meaning: adv. 在某处；到某处 pron. 某处；某个地方
questions.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
questions.cn: 像其他人一样，我准备好去某个地方度假了。
questions.hint: 合成词: some (一些) + where (地方) -> 某个地方。
questions.prompt: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday ____. (提示: adv. 在某处；到某处)

questions.context_sentence: No one could join me, so I went by myself.
questions.cn: 没人能陪我，所以我自己去了。
questions.hint: 合成词: my (我的) + self (自己) -> 我自己。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：pron. 我自己

questions.context_sentence: I could do nothing but stay in the hotel.
questions.cn: 我除了呆在旅馆里什么也做不了。
questions.hint: 固定表达: nothing (没有东西) + but (除了) -> 除了这个没有别的 -> 只有。
questions.prompt: I could do ____ stay in the hotel. (提示: 只有；只是)

questions.context_sentence: I could do nothing but stay in the hotel.
questions.cn: 我除了呆在旅馆里什么也做不了。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: 后台 (hotel)，大旅馆的后台都很硬。
questions.prompt: I could do nothing but stay in the ____. (提示: n. 旅馆；旅社)

questions.meaning: adj. 使人舒服的；舒适的
questions.context_sentence: The hotel was nice, with a comfortable bed, and everything was very clean.
questions.cn: 这家旅馆很好，有一张舒适的床，一切都很干净。
questions.hint: 词根记忆: comfort (安慰，舒服) + able (能够...的) -> 使人觉得舒服的。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：comfortable
options: adj. 使人舒服的；舒适的
adj. 负担得起的；便宜的

questions.context_sentence: I felt bored, so I decided to look for something to read.
questions.cn: 我觉得很无聊，所以我决定找点东西读读。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: 每天对着木板 (board) 就会感到厌倦 (bored)。
questions.prompt: I felt ____, so I decided to look for something to read. (提示: adj. 厌倦的；烦闷的)

questions.context_sentence: Look at the sky! How amazing!
questions.cn: 看天空！多令人惊叹啊！
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个间谍 (spy) 正抬头看着天空 (sky)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 天；天空

questions.context_sentence: I got up and walked towards the window.
questions.cn: 我站起来，朝窗户走去。
questions.hint: 方向后缀: to (向) + wards (表示方向的后缀) -> 朝着某处。
questions.prompt: I got up and walked ____ the window. (提示: prep. 向；朝)

questions.context_sentence: There was a beautiful double rainbow in the sky.
questions.cn: 天空中有一道美丽的双彩虹。
questions.hint: 合成词: rain (下雨) + bow (弓) -> 雨后天空中像弓一样的七彩桥就是彩虹。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：rainbow

questions.context_sentence: Wow, it's a silk scarf.
questions.cn: 哇，是一条丝绸围巾。
questions.hint: 谐音联想: 丝绸 (silk) 摸起来像牛奶 (milk) 一样光滑。
questions.prompt: Wow, it's a ____ scarf. (提示: n. 丝绸；(蚕)丝)

questions.context_sentence: Wow, it's a silk scarf.
questions.cn: 哇，是一条丝绸围巾。
questions.hint: 谐音联想: 这条 scarf (围巾) 的质量真是“死卡夫” (极好)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 围巾；披巾

questions.context_sentence: After that, we went to Red Square.
questions.cn: 之后，我们去了红场。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: “死鬼呀”，在广场 (square) 上大喊死鬼呀。
questions.prompt: After that, we went to Red ____. (提示: n. 广场；正方形)

questions.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
questions.cn: 晚饭期间，我不想吃东西，因为我感觉不舒服。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 在春天 (spring) 期间 (during)，繁花盛开。
questions.prompt: ____ dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick. (提示: prep. 在……期间)

questions.context_sentence: In the morning, we went to the Victory Museum.
questions.cn: 早上，我们去了胜利博物馆。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个胜利 (victory) 将被载入历史 (history) 中。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：victory

questions.meaning: adj. 俄罗斯的；俄罗斯人的 n. 俄罗斯人；俄语
questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造这座博物馆是为了纪念他们在第二次世界大战期间反抗纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: 音译词: Russia (俄罗斯) + n -> 俄罗斯的。
questions.prompt: The ____ people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II. (提示: adj. 俄罗斯的；俄罗斯人的)

questions.meaning: n. 战斗；搏斗；斗争 v. 打仗；打架
questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造这座博物馆是为了纪念他们在第二次世界大战期间反抗纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: 形似联想: 战士们在深夜 (night) 依然英勇战斗 (fight)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 战斗；搏斗；斗争

questions.meaning: n. 导游；指南 v. 领路；指导
questions.context_sentence: I worked as a tour guide at a museum.
questions.cn: 我在一家博物馆当导游。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: 导游 (guide) 走在队伍的“最前排” (guide)。
questions.prompt: I worked as a tour ____ at a museum. (提示: n. 导游；指南)

questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造这座博物馆是为了纪念他们在第二次世界大战期间反抗纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: 词干法: again (再次) + st -> 再次反对 (against) 对方的意见。
questions.prompt: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight ____ the Nazis during World War II. (提示: prep. 反对；与……相反)

questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造这座博物馆是为了纪念他们在第二次世界大战期间反抗纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: fight (斗争) + against (反对，对抗) -> 与……作斗争。
questions.prompt: The Russian people built this museum to remember their ____ the Nazis during World War II. (提示: 与……作战；与……作斗争)

questions.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
questions.cn: 在一个大厅里，我看到了一件由成千上万滴玻璃“眼泪”落下的艺术作品。
questions.hint: 合成词: art (艺术) + work (工作/作品) -> 艺术作品。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：artwork

questions.meaning: 数以千计的；成千上万的
questions.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
questions.cn: 在一个大厅里，我看到了一件由成千上万滴玻璃“眼泪”落下的艺术作品。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: thousands (成千) + of (的) -> 数以千计的。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：数以千计的；成千上万的

questions.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
questions.cn: 在一个大厅里，我看到了一件由成千上万滴玻璃“眼泪”落下的艺术作品。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: 提着 (tear) 一大袋眼泪。
questions.prompt: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "____" falling down. (提示: n. 眼泪；泪水)

questions.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
questions.cn: 它提醒我们，战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
questions.hint: 词干法: re (再次) + mind (心，脑子) -> 让脑子里再次想起 -> 提醒。
questions.prompt: It ____ us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily. (提示: v. 提醒；使想起)

questions.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
questions.cn: 它提醒我们，战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: 一片 (piece) 土地上终于迎来了和平 (peace)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 和平；太平

questions.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
questions.cn: 它提醒我们，战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
questions.hint: 词干法: easy (容易的) 变 y 为 i 再加 ly -> 容易地。
questions.prompt: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come ____. (提示: adv. 容易地；轻易地)

questions.context_sentence: At noon, we had lunch at a restaurant near the park.
questions.cn: 中午，我们在公园附近的一家餐馆吃了午饭。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: 中午 (noon) 很快 (soon) 就要到了。
questions.prompt: At ____, we had lunch at a restaurant near the park. (提示: n. 正午；中午)

questions.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
questions.cn: 晚饭期间，我不想吃东西，因为我感觉不舒服。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 生病 (sick) 的时候不要去摘 (pick) 花。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：sick

questions.context_sentence: We took the Moscow Metro to travel around.
questions.cn: 我们乘莫斯科地铁到处游览。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: “美桌”，地铁站里有一张很美的桌子。
questions.prompt: We took the Moscow ____ to travel around. (提示: n. 地下铁道系统)

questions.context_sentence: The metro stations are really beautiful.
questions.cn: 地铁站真的很漂亮。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 我们国家 (nation) 的火车站 (station) 非常漂亮。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 车站；所；局

questions.context_sentence: Sometimes I felt like I was walking inside a palace.
questions.cn: 有时我觉得自己仿佛走在皇宫里。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: 王宫 (palace) 是一个非常特别的地方 (place)。
questions.prompt: Sometimes I felt like I was walking inside a ____. (提示: n. 王宫；宫殿)

questions.context_sentence: Later, someone took out his accordion, and soon everyone got together to sing and dance.
questions.cn: 后来，有人拿出了手风琴，很快大家就聚集在一起唱歌跳舞。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: accordion 是手风琴，发音很长，像手风琴拉出的长音。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：accordion

questions.context_sentence: Later, someone took out his accordion, and soon everyone got together to sing and dance.
questions.cn: 后来，有人拿出了手风琴，很快大家就聚集在一起唱歌跳舞。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: get (得到，到达) + together (在一起) -> 聚在一起，聚会。
questions.prompt: Later, someone took out his accordion, and soon everyone ____ to sing and dance. (提示: 聚会；相聚)

questions.context_sentence: I felt sick after staying in the sun for too long.
questions.cn: 在阳光下呆了太久，我感到有些恶心。
questions.hint: 固定搭配: in (在...里面) + the sun (太阳) -> 晒太阳，在阳光下。
questions.prompt: I felt sick after staying ____ for too long. (提示: 在阳光下)

questions.context_sentence: The tour guide told us the ancient tower was over 1,000 years old.
questions.cn: 导游告诉我们那座古塔有1000多年的历史了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 这座高塔 (tower) 旁边开满鲜花 (flower)。
questions.prompt: The tour guide told us the ancient ____ was over 1,000 years old. (提示: n. 塔；塔楼)

questions.context_sentence: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over budget.
questions.cn: 别在节日购物上花太多钱，否则你可能会超出预算。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: 今天晚上 (night) 可能 (might) 会下雨。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：modal v. 可能；可以

questions.meaning: n. 预算 v. 精打细算
questions.context_sentence: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over budget.
questions.cn: 别在节日购物上花太多钱，否则你可能会超出预算。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: “拔地鸡”，买这只鸡超出了我的预算 (budget)。
questions.prompt: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over ____. (提示: n. 预算)

questions.context_sentence: Please remind me to take my passport before I leave.
questions.cn: 走之前请提醒我带上护照。
questions.hint: 合成词: pass (通过) + port (港口) -> 能让你通过港口/海关的东西就是护照。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：passport

questions.context_sentence: I'm getting a little forgetful these days.
questions.cn: 这些天我变得有点健忘了。
questions.hint: 词缀法: forget (忘记) + ful (充满...的) -> 充满忘记的，意为健忘的。
questions.prompt: I'm getting a little ____ these days. (提示: adj. 健忘的；好忘事的)

questions.context_sentence: Some travel to see beautiful sights and relax in strange, faraway places.
questions.cn: 有些人旅行是为了欣赏美丽的风景，并在陌生、遥远的地方放松身心。
questions.hint: 词干法: far (远的) + away (离开) -> 遥远的。
questions.prompt: Some travel to see beautiful sights and relax in strange, ____ places. (提示: adj. 远方的；遥远的)

questions.context_sentence: Then you can go back to your regular life, and be ready to see what comes next.
questions.cn: 然后你可以回到你规律的生活中，准备好迎接接下来发生的事情。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: “若谷勒”，有规律的 (regular) 生活要虚怀若谷。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 平常的；有规律的

questions.context_sentence: We stayed in a comfortable house in the countryside with beautiful scenery.
questions.cn: 我们住在农村一栋舒适的房子里，周围风景优美。
questions.hint: 合成词: country (国家，乡下) + side (旁边) -> 乡下，乡村。
questions.prompt: We stayed in a comfortable house in the ____ with beautiful scenery. (提示: n. 乡村；农村)

questions.context_sentence: I turned around and was surprised to see a deer.
questions.cn: 我转过身，惊讶地发现了一只鹿。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: turn (转动) + around (周围) -> 转身。
questions.prompt: I ____ and was surprised to see a deer. (提示: 转身；翻转)

questions.context_sentence: I turned around and was surprised to see a deer.
questions.cn: 我转过身，惊讶地发现了一只鹿。
questions.hint: 词干法: surprise (使惊奇) + ed (形容词后缀, 感到...) -> 感到惊讶的。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：surprised

questions.context_sentence: I turned around and was surprised to see a deer.
questions.cn: 我转过身，惊讶地发现了一只鹿。
questions.hint: 谐音联想: 鹿 (deer) 最喜欢喝啤酒 (beer)。
questions.prompt: I turned around and was surprised to see a ____. (提示: n. 鹿)

questions.context_sentence: The deer is probably looking for food and hoping to get some from you.
questions.cn: 这只鹿可能正在寻找食物，并希望从你那里得到一些。
questions.hint: 词干法: probable (很可能的) 变 y 为 ly -> 很可能地。
questions.prompt: The deer is ____ looking for food and hoping to get some from you. (提示: adv. 很可能；大概)

questions.context_sentence: The deer is probably looking for food and hoping to get some from you.
questions.cn: 这只鹿可能正在寻找食物，并希望从你那里得到一些。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: look (看) + for (为了...) -> 为了得到某样东西而去看 -> 寻找。
questions.prompt: The deer is probably ____ food and hoping to get some from you. (提示: 寻找)

questions.context_sentence: We took a lot of great photos there.
questions.cn: 我们在那儿拍了许多绝妙的照片。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: take (拿，拍摄) + photos (照片) -> 拍照。
questions.prompt: We ____ a lot of great photos there. (提示: 拍照；照相)

questions.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
questions.cn: 晚饭期间，我不想吃东西，因为我感觉不舒服。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: feel like (想要) + eating (吃东西) -> 想要吃。
questions.prompt: during dinner, I didn't ____ because I felt sick. (提示: 想要吃；有胃口吃)

questions.context_sentence: So now, I just want to get a good night's sleep.
questions.cn: 所以现在，我只想好好睡一觉。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: get (得到) + a good night's sleep (一夜好眠) -> 好好睡一觉。
questions.prompt: So now, I just want to ____. (提示: 好好睡一觉)

questions.context_sentence: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over budget.
questions.cn: 别在节日购物上花太多钱，否则你可能会超出预算。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: over (超过) + budget (预算) -> 超出预算。
questions.prompt: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go ____. (提示: 超出预算)

questions.context_sentence: Yaming saw the Guest-Greeting Pine, the Sea of Clouds, lots of strange rocks, and many ancient buildings.
questions.cn: 亚明看到了迎客松、云海、许多奇形怪状的岩石以及许多古老的建筑。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个古老的 (ancient) 人表现得很耐心 (patient)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 古代的；古老的

questions.meaning: n. 度假营；营地 v. 露营；宿营
questions.context_sentence: went to a summer camp
questions.cn: 去参加了夏令营
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 露营地 (camp) 里有一盏漂亮的台灯 (lamp)。
questions.prompt: went to a summer ____ (提示: n. 度假营；营地)

questions.context_sentence: The landscape there was amazing.
questions.cn: 那里的风景太迷人了。
questions.hint: 合成词: land (土地) + scape (景象) -> 土地上的景象就是风景。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 风景；景色

questions.context_sentence: lots of strange rocks
questions.cn: 许多奇形怪状的岩石
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个陌生 (strange) 的地方发生了一些改变 (change)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：strange

questions.context_sentence: Where did Yaming / Emma go on holiday / vacation?
questions.cn: 亚明/艾玛去哪里度假/过节了？
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 假期 (vacation) 去了一个非常好玩的地方 (location)。
questions.prompt: Where did Yaming / Emma go on holiday / ____? (提示: n. 假期；度假)

questions.context_sentence: Don't forget that.
questions.cn: 别忘了那个。
questions.hint: 词干法: for (为了) + get (得到) -> 为了得到新的，就要忘记 (forget) 旧的。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：v. 忘记；遗忘

questions.context_sentence: It was fantastic.
questions.cn: 这太棒了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个极好的 (fantastic) 玩具是塑料 (plastic) 做的。
questions.prompt: It was ____. (提示: adj. 极好的；吸引人的)

questions.context_sentence: Yes, we stayed in the old town for a few days, and we enjoyed it very much.
questions.cn: 是的，我们在古镇住了几天，我们非常喜欢这里。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 顺着这条路往下 (down) 走，就是我们的那个小镇 (town)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 镇；商业区

questions.meaning: n. 呼吸 of 空气；一口气
questions.context_sentence: It just took my breath away.
questions.cn: 这简直让我惊叹不已。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: breath (呼吸) 和 death (死亡) 只差一个字母，没有呼吸就死亡。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：breath
options: n. 呼吸的空气；一口气

questions.context_sentence: Everything tasted good, especially the steamed chicken soup.
questions.cn: 每样东西尝起来都很棒，尤其是汽锅鸡。
questions.hint: 词缀法: especially 是在 specially (特别地) 前加 es 强化语气，意为“尤其”。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adv. 尤其；特别

questions.meaning: adv. & pron. 在任何地方；随便哪个地方
questions.context_sentence: Did you go anywhere interesting?
questions.cn: 你去过什么有趣的地方吗？
questions.hint: 合成词: any (任何) + where (地方) -> 任何地方。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：anywhere
options: adv. & pron. 在任何地方；随便哪个地方
pron. 任何事物；无论什么

questions.meaning: pron. 没有事；没有任何东西
questions.context_sentence: I did nothing special.
questions.cn: 我没做什么特别的事。
questions.hint: 合成词: no (没有) + thing (东西) -> 没有东西。
questions.prompt: I did ____ special. (提示: pron. 没有事；没有任何东西)

questions.context_sentence: Really? Everyone says the scenery around the West Lake is so beautiful.
questions.cn: 真的吗？大家都说西湖周围的风景太美了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: scen (看，舞台) + ery -> 舞台上的景色就是风景。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：scenery

questions.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
questions.cn: 像其他人一样，我准备好去某个地方度假了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: already (已经) 的词根就是 ready (准备好的)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 准备好的；现成的

questions.meaning: adv. 在某处；到某处 pron. 某处；某个地方
questions.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
questions.cn: 像其他人一样，我准备好去某个地方度假了。
questions.hint: 合成词: some (一些) + where (地方) -> 某个地方。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：somewhere
options: adv. 无处；没有任何地方
adv. 在某处；到某处 pron. 某处；某个地方
adv. 以某种方式；不知怎么地

questions.context_sentence: No one could join me, so I went by myself.
questions.cn: 没人能陪我，所以我自己去了。
questions.hint: 合成词: my (我的) + self (自己) -> 我自己。
questions.prompt: No one could join me, so I went by ____. (提示: pron. 我自己)

questions.context_sentence: I could do nothing but stay in the hotel.
questions.cn: 我除了呆在旅馆里什么也做不了。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: 后台 (hotel)，大旅馆的后台都很硬。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 旅馆；旅社

questions.meaning: adj. 使人舒服的；舒适的
questions.context_sentence: The hotel was nice, with a comfortable bed, and everything was very clean.
questions.cn: 这家旅馆很好，有一张舒适的床，一切都很干净。
questions.hint: 词根记忆: comfort (安慰，舒服) + able (能够...的) -> 使人觉得舒服的。
questions.prompt: The hotel was nice, with a ____ bed, and everything was very clean. (提示: adj. 使人舒服的；舒适的)

questions.context_sentence: I felt bored, so I decided to look for something to read.
questions.cn: 我觉得很无聊，所以我决定找点东西读读。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: 每天对着木板 (board) 就会感到厌倦 (bored)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 厌倦的；烦闷的

questions.context_sentence: Look at the sky! How amazing!
questions.cn: 看天空！多令人惊叹啊！
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个间谍 (spy) 正抬头看着天空 (sky)。
questions.prompt: Look at the ____! How amazing! (提示: n. 天；天空)

questions.context_sentence: I got up and walked towards the window.
questions.cn: 我站起来，朝窗户走去。
questions.hint: 方向后缀: to (向) + wards (表示方向的后缀) -> 朝着某处。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：prep. 向；朝

questions.context_sentence: There was a beautiful double rainbow in the sky.
questions.cn: 天空中有一道美丽的双彩虹。
questions.hint: 合成词: rain (下雨) + bow (弓) -> 雨后天空中像弓一样的七彩桥就是彩虹。
questions.prompt: There was a beautiful double ____ in the sky. (提示: n. 虹；彩虹)

questions.context_sentence: Wow, it's a silk scarf.
questions.cn: 哇，是一条丝绸围巾。
questions.hint: 谐音联想: 丝绸 (silk) 摸起来像牛奶 (milk) 一样光滑。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：silk

questions.context_sentence: Wow, it's a silk scarf.
questions.cn: 哇，是一条丝绸围巾。
questions.hint: 谐音联想: 这条 scarf (围巾) 的质量真是“死卡夫” (极好)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：scarf

questions.context_sentence: After that, we went to Red Square.
questions.cn: 之后，我们去了红场。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: “死鬼呀”，在广场 (square) 上大喊死鬼呀。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 广场；正方形

questions.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
questions.cn: 晚饭期间，我不想吃东西，因为我感觉不舒服。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 在春天 (spring) 期间 (during)，繁花盛开。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：during

questions.context_sentence: In the morning, we went to the Victory Museum.
questions.cn: 早上，我们去了胜利博物馆。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个胜利 (victory) 将被载入历史 (history) 中。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 胜利；成功

questions.meaning: n. 战斗；搏斗；斗争 v. 打仗；打架
questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造这座博物馆是为了纪念他们在第二次世界大战期间反抗纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: 形似联想: 战士们在深夜 (night) 依然英勇战斗 (fight)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的中文意思：fight

questions.meaning: n. 导游；指南 v. 领路；指导
questions.context_sentence: I worked as a tour guide at a museum.
questions.cn: 我在一家博物馆当导游。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: 导游 (guide) 走在队伍的“最前排” (guide)。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 导游；指南

questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造这座博物馆是为了纪念他们在第二次世界大战期间反抗纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: 词干法: again (再次) + st -> 再次反对 (against) 对方的意见。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：prep. 反对；与……相反

questions.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
questions.cn: 在一个大厅里，我看到了一件由成千上万滴玻璃“眼泪”落下的艺术作品。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: 提着 (tear) 一大袋眼泪。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 眼泪；泪水

questions.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
questions.cn: 它提醒我们，战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
questions.hint: 词干法: re (再次) + mind (心，脑子) -> 让脑子里再次想起 -> 提醒。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：v. 提醒；使想起

questions.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
questions.cn: 它提醒我们，战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
questions.hint: 词干法: easy (容易的) 变 y 为 i 再加 ly -> 容易地。
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adv. 容易地；轻易地
